articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: The Pixel 10a doesn’t have a camera bump, and it’s great - TechCrunch
articles.description: The Google Pixel 10a can lay flat on a table, but otherwise the company hasn't brought a ton of upgrades to its newest budget smartphone.
articles.content: For years now, smartphone makers have made the camera bump on devices bigger in order to chase camera improvements. Even if that kind of design makes cameras better, at times it creates usability iss… [+5105 chars]

articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ becomes Amazon MGM’s biggest box office hit - TechCrunch
articles.description: Amazon’s bet on “Project Hail Mary” has paid off handsomely.
articles.content:
Amazons bet on Project Hail Mary has paid off handsomely, with the film recently surpassing Creed III to become the companys highest grossing movie ever.
And it was a big bet, with a reported budget… [+1970 chars]
